name: Zuchinni-Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 1 1/4 cups of sugar, oil, eggs, lemon rind, and lemon juice. Mix well.
2. Stir in the shredded zucchini.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, soda, and salt. Gradually add to the zucchini mixture, stirring well.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts. Pour batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool; dust top with sifted powdered sugar.
7. Cut into bars. Yield: 2 dozen
